---
title: "BetaResult"
generated: true
description: "Per-element beta-regression fit output."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.betareg`](../nitrix-stats-betareg.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BetaResult -->
```python
class BetaResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:BetaResult -->
Per-element beta-regression fit output.

Frozen container of the fitted mean-model coefficients, precision,
coefficient covariance, and maximised log-likelihood for every element of a
mass-univariate beta regression, together with the observation count.  Each
of the `V` elements (voxels, vertices, ...) is fitted independently and
shares the single design matrix passed to `beta_fit`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BetaResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(coef: Float[Array, 'V p'], precision: Float[Array, 'V'], cov_unscaled: Float[Array, 'V p p'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], n_obs: int) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:BetaResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
